details.description: Solstice is a Solana-native DeFi protocol offering $USX stablecoin and YieldVault with delta-neutral strategies for sustainable, high-yield returns on stable assets.
BitRobot Network is an open robotics network accelerating embodied AI breakthroughs by combining people, robots, and computing power for decentralized robot training and validation.
Incentiv is an efficient, simple, and impactful Layer 1 blockchain where every action counts, focusing on real usage, aligned incentives, and community-driven growth.
EverValue Coin (EVA) is a token backed by Bitcoin mining infrastructure, with daily increasing backing and real-world utility through transparent operations and global expansion.
Chance is a perpetual learner and thinker focused on understanding how and why things work; not primarily crypto-focused but occasionally engages with tech and innovation discussions.
PredictBase is a decentralized prediction market platform on Base, featuring AI agents like @predibot_and $PREDI token for betting on real-world events with community-driven outcomes.
Byzanlink is an RWA tokenization platform bridging DeFi and TradFi, backed by Outlier Ventures and NTDPSA, enabling secure, programmable real-world asset yield and on-chain capital markets.
LF Wallet is a one-stop non-custodial wallet for managing on-chain assets, offering seamless access to DeFi, NFTs, and multi-chain support in a user-friendly interface.

DoubleZero is building a dedicated internet layer optimized for blockchains, crypto, AI, and real-time applications with high performance and low latency; raised significant funding for scalable on-chain infrastructure.
GoHome is a community-driven meme token on Solana emphasizing fun, long-term cult narratives, zero toxicity, and rewards through staking, trading, memes, contests, and NFT drops.
GBM is a win-win auction system where outbid bidders earn rewards; processed $200M+ in volume with $6M+ earned by participants, focused on fair NFT and asset auctions.
Concordium is a privacy-focused Layer-1 blockchain for trust, identity, compliance, and real-world adoption; expanding global communities with ambassadors, regional mods, and builders.
Venus Protocol is an open-source money market infrastructure on BNB Chain, enabling lending, borrowing, and DeFi innovations with flux updates and cross-chain features.

T-RIZE is an institutional-grade RWA tokenization infrastructure platform combining machine learning with blockchain, enabling secure, compliant real-world asset tokenization; official member of Canton Network with $RIZE token listed on major exchanges like Kraken.

Novastro is a modular RWAfi layer powered by AI, Ethereum-aligned and scaling across Sui, Arbitrum, and Solana, allowing users to tokenize, trade, and earn yields on real-world assets with compliance-first infrastructure and $XNL token.
StandX is a perpetuals trading platform on BNB and Solana, featuring auto yield-bearing $DUSD collateral, public mainnet live with perps trading, points programs, and rewards for makers and traders.

Hotstuff is a DeFi-native Layer 1 blockchain with a high-performance on-chain order book and programmable finance routing layer, connecting trading to global fiat rails for seamless, confidential DeFi.
Treble is the first V4 DEX and DeFi Hub on Base, enabling launch, swap, farm, spend, and more with DeFAI features and native $TREB token for seamless on-chain trading and liquidity.
Stellar Africa builds and grows the Stellar ecosystem across West Africa, supporting local communities, events, education, and adoption of blockchain for payments and financial inclusion.
XION is the trust layer for the internet, turning verified data into programmable value, leveraged by over 150 brands.
Injective is a blockchain built for finance, offering high-speed trading and advanced DeFi capabilities.
Theoriq is home of AlphaVault, autonomous onchain yield powered by agent swarms.
Sentient Ecosystem empowers builders, researchers, and the community in advancing open-source AGI.
Cronos is bringing real-world finance to billions on-chain, with EVM compatibility, AI-ready features, and compliance.
Midnight is an innovative blockchain empowering ground-breaking apps that safeguard sensitive commercial and personal data.
Nexo is the premier digital assets wealth platform for growing, trading, borrowing, and earning on digital assets.
Hedera is an enterprise-grade public network built on hashgraph consensus.
Altius provides an institutional-grade execution layer to futureproof your blockchain with instant high performance.
Alchemy Pay is a fiat-crypto payment gateway bridging fiat and crypto global economies.
Hedra is the most productive way to go from idea to content, leveraging generative video and image models.
Sanity United makes life easier through task delegation and sustainable crypto mining powered by renewables.
PIVX is a privacy-focused cryptocurrency that believes in keeping your data secure while transacting online.
Rootstock is Bitcoin's DeFi layer, established in 2015, enabling BTCFi.
Haven is an on-chain fixed income supermarket bringing real-world assets (RWA) to DeFi with secure, yield-generating opportunities.
Optimum is a turbocharged data propagation layer for any blockchain, powered by RLNC for efficient, decentralized performance.
HeLa is an AI-native Layer 1 blockchain for human-AI collaboration, combining personalized AI with native yields on one chain.
DegenPhone enables minting, using, and trading real phone numbers as NFTs on TON, offering fast, private, KYC-free mobile connectivity.
Axis AI is an entropy reduction machine focused on transferring human intelligence into robotics general intelligence, built collaboratively.
Sahara AI is a full-stack, AI-native blockchain platform enabling users to build, contribute to, and monetize AI in an open ecosystem.
Shardeum is a scalable Layer 1 blockchain building a homegrown onchain ecosystem, focused on accessibility and dApps for India and beyond.
dTelecom is a decentralized real-time communication network on Solana, enabling voice, video, and chat flows with owned resources and rewards.
Interlink Network builds a verified human network in Web3, focusing on real users, not bots, with tokens like $ITLG and $ITL.
Qensa is a modern Myspace-style link-in-bio tool for curating microsites to showcase art, NFTs, work, videos, merch, music, and more.
Limitless enables nonstop hourly and daily prediction markets for crypto and stock prices, allowing users to trade anytime with over $750M+ in volume.
Arbitrum is an Ethereum Layer 2 scaling solution offering secure, fast, cheap, and EVM-compatible transactions for an onchain ecosystem for all.

QuillAudits is a leading blockchain security auditor with 7+ years of experience, securing over 1M+ lines of code and 1400+ clients including StarkWare, Taiko, and ZetaChain, offering next-gen audits, KYC, and on-chain monitoring.
MultiversX is a highly scalable, secure, and green distributed blockchain network powered by adaptive state sharding, enabling next-gen decentralized applications with high throughput and low fees.
Oasis Protocol is a privacy-enabled blockchain platform with confidential compute via Sapphire Paratime, empowering responsible data usage, Web3 privacy, and secure AI applications.

Moonbeam is an Ethereum-compatible smart contract platform on Polkadot, providing seamless cross-chain interoperability, EVM support, and tools for building decentralized applications in a multi-chain ecosystem.
Seq Protocol (Sequoia Protocol) is building a high-performance Layer 1 blockchain focused on scalable DeFi and real-world applications with strong community incentives.
Goldfish is a fun, community-driven GameFi project offering engaging gameplay, rewards, and a monthly $5,000 reward pool for active ambassadors and content creators.
Mandala Chain is a sovereign blockchain infrastructure platform designed to connect retail, government, and enterprise, enabling rapid deployment for mass adoption in Southeast Asia and beyond.
DZap is a unified DeFi execution layer providing seamless access across 100+ chains and providers, with powerful tools for builders, traders, and liquidity providers.
TeaFi is a crypto super app offering seamless DeFi tools, trading, and community features with a strong focus on user experience and ecosystem growth.
Kult Games is a Web3 gaming ecosystem empowering true digital ownership, play-to-earn mechanics, and community-driven development in the next generation of blockchain gaming.
AveForge is building advanced DeFi tools and infrastructure focused on yield optimization, trading, and creator tools in the Web3 space.
WheelX is a DeFi platform offering innovative yield strategies, liquidity solutions, and on-chain trading experiences with strong community incentives.
SpeculateX is a decentralized prediction market on BNB Chain where users trade yes/no outcomes on crypto and real-world events with revenue-sharing rewards for ambassadors.
dFusion AI combines AI fact-checking with decentralized consensus through Vericore, building a truth-verified internet via semantic intelligence and community-driven data subnets.
Helm Trading is a growing crypto trading platform offering community rewards and real $HELM incentives for active ambassadors and contributors.
